name: Sino-i Technology Limited
summary: Sino-i Technology Limited, an investment holding company, provides enterprise cloud services to small and medium enterprises in Mainland China and Hong Kong. The company also offers software as a service (SaaS) mode e-commerce and information application services, such as website construction, B2C online shopping mall, corporate mailbox, online marketing and promotions, etc.; and Internet services, including domain name registration, virtual server hosting, and self-service station building services. It offers its products through online direct sales and agent channels. The company is based in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong. Sino-i Technology Limited is a subsidiary of Nan Hai Corporation Limited.
